step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("recent high-quality RCTs on remote ischemic postconditioning and myocardial protection during percutaneous coronary intervention")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

You must write at most two sentences. Then state your final answer choice with \boxed{}.
Recent high-quality randomized controlled trials indicate that remote ischemic postconditioning (RIPC) does not offer superior myocardial protection compared to conventional techniques during percutaneous coronary intervention. The lack of consistent beneficial effects across well-designed studies undermines any claim of clinical significance.
